title: artemisia norvegica subsp. globularia
intro: Artemisia norvegica subsp. globularia, also known as Norwegian wormwood or Nordens wormwood, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Artemisia norvegica. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Artemisia norvegica subsp. globularia include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
